cost_and_execution.execution: first authorized PF 5m open at or after decision/target, maximum 10 minute delay
cost_and_execution.non_overlap: translation-symbol local using actual executable exit
cost_and_execution.primary_metric: base net expectancy after 14 bps and signed exact-or-conservative-adverse funding
cost_and_execution.published_panel_coverage: 2024-01-01 through 2025-12-21 required-boundary panel; exact source concentrated from 2025-06-26
cost_and_execution.required_preoutcome_2023_remedy: apply frozen model 0054af0e with unchanged parameters to every registered 2023 boundary using PIT inputs before opening outcomes; do not retrain or relabel missing as zero-boundary; event/fold fails closed at the registered coverage floor

resource_limits.projection: mechanism-complete 96/48/84 registry is below the benchmark-derived cell ceiling; each cell and shared writer is separately hard-capped; stop before either four hours or 5 GiB
